message:
feat(conformance,lax,core): edge-case AD verification, dtype promotion oracle parity, JVP numerical tests

Add comprehensive numerical verification tests for AD edge cases including
near-singular Cholesky/QR/SVD/Eigh VJPs, denormal inputs, ill-conditioned
matrices, and large-matrix finite-difference checks. Add dtype promotion
oracle parity tests validating FrankenJAX against JAX reference semantics.
Add JVP numerical verification tests for core primitives. Extend fj-core
with additional scalar/tensor utility methods and fix fj-lax type promotion
for mixed-precision edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
